title: reddimension
description: This mod adds a new dimension called the reddimension with new bosses and items to get.
body:
This mod is abandoned because the files have been corupted but a sequal is coming soon.

This mod adds a 2 dimensions called the reddimension and the jungle wasteland (hopefully much more dimensions in later versions.) With the dimensions comes 4 new bosses,2 mini bosses,1 normal mob and lots of items.

List of mobs,Bosses and Minibosses:
- Redguard (Mob)
- Redguardboss (Miniboss)
- Imposter (Boss)
- Galactic Leader (Boss)
- Xp God (Boss)
- Camo Spider (Miniboss)
- Aye-aye (Mob)
- Aye-aye King (Boss)
- Treetop Phantom (Boss)
 
Note: (If you want to fight the bosses you'll have to craft the spawn eggs. Mobs and Minibosses spawn naturally or in structures.) 

To start make a portal out of redstone blocks and use a reddimension portal igniter to ignite it.
RECIPE:![Put a redstone block in the center surrounded by 4 redsrone torches.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c5ddb1e713745c6a45bec735e47985371deef95.png)

To go to the Jungle Wasteland make a portal out of emerald blocks and use the Jungle Wasteland portal igniter to ignite it RECIPE:
![Put a emerald block in the centre surrounded by 4 emeralds.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6df946f95fcbb486534d9332d71d089c78958d09.png)

For the rest of the recipes just use Jei to view them.

This was made with mcreator
